## Customise the templates

All `.j2` files from the exported pack are copies — edit them freely.
The generator searches the pack directory first, so your edits shadow the
built-in templates automatically.

**Common customisations:**

_Add a company file header to every generated file_

In `top.vhdl.j2`, prepend your standard header before the `library` clause:

```vhdl
-- ============================================================
-- {{ display_name }}  |  {{ vendor | upper }}
-- Generated by IPCraft {{ entity_name }}.ip.yml
-- ============================================================
library ieee;
...
```

_Change the register file coding style_

Open `register_file.vhdl.j2` and adjust signal naming, process sensitivity
lists, or reset polarity — the preview panel shows the result live.

_Add a new output file type_

Add a rule to `scaffold.yml` pointing to a new template in the pack folder.
The preview panel immediately shows the new file in the tree.

**Tip:** Delete any `.j2` file you don't need to customise. The generator
falls back to the built-in version automatically, keeping your pack lean.
